suburbs.description: Your investment only works if you dominate your local market. We won't dilute your presence by working with your competitors.

investment.title: The Real Cost of Professional Video Content
investment.subtitle: If you hired these roles separately in New Zealand...
investment.priceNote: All-inclusive. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime after 90 days.

process.title: From Zero to Suburb Domination in 30 Days
process.subtitle: Our proven 4-week onboarding process

bullets.text: 60-min deep-dive: your suburb demographics, competitor analysis, positioning strategy
Content calendar customized to your suburb's selling seasons
We film at 3-4 locations in your suburb (properties, cafes, landmarks)
Capture enough content for 16+ finished pieces
Professional lighting, sound, and direction included
Our editors create 16+ platform-optimized videos (IG, TikTok, YouTube, FB)
Add captions, music, color grading, your branding
First 4 videos published (you review and approve)
Performance review: views, engagement, enquiry attribution

qualification.title: This ISN'T for Everyone
qualification.subtitle: We're selective about who we work with. Here's why:

dontApply.title: You're happy with 3-5 deals per year
dontApply.description: This is for agents who want to dominate, not just survive

dontApply.title: You don't want to be on camera
dontApply.description: Personal brand = you need to show your face

dontApply.title: You have less than 2 years experience
dontApply.description: Content amplifies what you already do well - you need a foundation first

dontApply.title: Your suburb has fewer than 500 properties
dontApply.description: Market too small for suburb exclusivity model to work effectively

dontApply.title: You want instant results
dontApply.description: This is a 90-day play. If you need listings tomorrow, this isn't it.

perfectIf.title: Close 10+ deals annually and want to double it
perfectIf.description: You have the skills, now we amplify your reach

perfectIf.title: Understand that personal brand = premium positioning
perfectIf.description: You're ready to be THE local expert

perfectIf.title: Want to work smarter, not harder
perfectIf.description: Let content work while you're at open homes

perfectIf.title: Willing to commit 4 hours/month to filming

guarantee.title: The 60-Day Listing Win Guarantee
guarantee.subtitle: We're so confident in suburb exclusivity, we'll put our money where our mouth is
guarantee.promiseIntro: If within 60 days of your content going live, you don't win at least ONE additional listing that you can directly attribute to your video presence, we will:

promiseSteps.text: Refund 100% of your investment (every dollar you've paid)
Continue working with you for FREE until you win a listing
Release your suburb so you can try something else (no hard feelings)

guarantee.attributionText: Simple: The seller says they found you through social media / saw your videos / recognized you from Instagram/TikTok during the appraisal.
guarantee.attributionNote: Most agents report 2-4 enquiries in the first 60 days specifically mentioning "I see you everywhere" or "I love your videos"
guarantee.whyText: Because suburb exclusivity works. When you're the only professional video presence in your area, sellers WILL notice. We've seen it work 150+ times.

cta.headline: Your Suburb Won't Wait Forever
cta.subheadline: Another agent in your area could claim exclusivity while you're thinking about it
cta.description: Book a free 30-minute suburb audit. We'll analyze your area, show you who your video competitors are (hint: probably none), and determine if suburb exclusivity will work for you - no pressure, no obligation.
